case_title: FELIPE CERVANTES VS. FAITH N JASON CONSTRUCTION, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR DENENBERG, DANIEL K.

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CERVANTES, FELIPE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FAITH N JASON CONSTRUCTION, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $18,554.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $18,554.00, EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS OF SUIT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (PER ORDER VACATING JUDGMENT FILED OCTOBER 22, 2019)
